特記事項: 【合併】総合日本学習科目（日本のビジネスA）（CIEC）/Japanese Business A（国際学部）
授業方法: Seminar. Based on weekly readings and class discussions, students will gain an understanding of characteristics and phenomena of the Japanese employment system. At the beginning of each class students will introduce the class topic followed by class discussions that will be supplemented by materials from the instructor, such as newspaper articles, recent statistics and film clips from documentaries and interviews.

第1回:
【Startup Week】"No Video"
Online class (Task-based)／《90minutes》
Theme: Introduction to Work and Life in Japan
第2回:
【Core Week 1】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Work and Life in Contemporary Japan
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第3回:
【Core Week 2】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Human Resource Management in Japanese Companies
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第4回:
【Core Week 3】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: The Recruitment Process in the Japanese Firm
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第5回:
【Core Week 4】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Foreigners in the Japanese Labor Market
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第6回:
【Core Week 5】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Globalization and the Rise of Flexible Labor
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第7回:
【Core Week 6】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Freeter, NEET and Working Poor
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第8回:
【Core Week 7】
Online class (Task-based)／《90minutes》
Theme: Examples of Freeter, NEET and Working Poor
第9回: Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第11回:
【Core Week 10】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Employment Conditions of Women and Gender Equality
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第12回:
【Core Week 11】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Workplace Harassment and Mental Health
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第13回: Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
トピック.授業外学習2: Beside the study required outside class specified above students will also have to present one of the class topics and and write a term paper.

教科書/Required texts0: A reading list of relevant articles will be provided in the first class
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1

name: 【300】総合日本学習科目（日本のビジネスA）／JSC Japanese Business A
